text.content: Steel-reinforced radial flotation implement tires for agricultural tanker and trailer applications. Belt-stabilized tread provides longest treadwear, high stability and high resistance to punctures and field hazards. Optimized tread pattern provides excellent field traction while minimizing vibration at roading speeds.
